summary: Completed comprehensive testing of News Ledger dashboard with vintage newspaper styling. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), frontend displaying correctly with minor data-testid selector issues.

design_issues.issue: data-testid selectors inconsistent - 'U.S.' category uses 'category-us.' (with period) and 'World' category selector timing issues

passed_tests: All 7 backend API endpoints working (categories, featured, spotlight, sidebar, bottom, opinions)
Featured article section displays with image and content
Right sidebar shows featured articles list
News ticker displays and animates at bottom
Category navigation functionality working (clicking activates categories)
All 9 categories present in navigation (U.S., World, Local, Business, Technology, Entertainment, Sports, Science, Health)
